findings.title: Zero initialized BrakeHealthCurrent fleet-wide
findings.dataEvidence: VPS PostgreSQL read-only 2026-07-17; 355 trip_driving_impact rows unused by wear model
findings.impact: Wear model never executes; rental health and UI show NO_BASELINE for all vehicles
findings.reproduction: SELECT count(*) FROM brake_health_current WHERE is_initialized

findings.title: Registration reference specs exist but init never applied
findings.codeEvidence: vehicles.service registerFromDimo → initializeFromRegistration; backfill script exists
findings.impact: Fleet has DOCUMENTED spec data but no anchors; DI inputs idle
findings.reproduction: Compare ref_specs count vs brake_health_current count
findings.recommendation: Execute registration backfill for eligible vehicles

findings.title: Trip driving impact computed but brake recalculation produces no state
findings.codeEvidence: DrivingImpactProcessor calls recalculate; recalculate returns null when not initialized
findings.dataEvidence: 356 trips with TDI / 60d; 0 brake_health_current; lastRecalculatedAt absent
findings.impact: Post-trip recalc is no-op; hourly scheduler also iterates zero initialized vehicles
findings.reproduction: Observe recalculate early-return in brake-health.service.ts L661-663
findings.recommendation: Initialize baselines before relying on trip-triggered recalc
requiredTests: integration: init → trip → recalc writes BHC

findings.title: Active DTC not ingested into BrakeEvidence
findings.codeEvidence: No producer VehicleDtcEvent → BrakeEvidence in codebase
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_005: active P0675 WARNING in vehicle_dtc_events; 0 brake_evidence
findings.impact: Canonical safety path blind to live DTC; rental/UI cannot surface DTC-based brake alerts
findings.reproduction: SELECT * FROM vehicle_dtc_events WHERE is_active AND vehicle matches VEHICLE_005 rank
findings.recommendation: Wire DTC poll → BrakeEvidence DTC_SIGNAL with clearance handling

findings.title: BRAKE enrichment jobs stuck PENDING
findings.codeEvidence: vehicles.service creates EnrichmentJobType.BRAKE; no processor found
findings.impact: Registration pipeline signals incomplete brake onboarding
findings.reproduction: SELECT status,count(*) FROM vehicle_enrichment_jobs WHERE job_type='BRAKE' GROUP BY 1
findings.recommendation: Implement processor or remove orphan job type

findings.title: 38.5% completed trips lack TripDrivingImpact rows
findings.codeEvidence: DI queue processes subset of trips; enrichment gaps documented in driving-analysis audit
findings.impact: If initialized, coverage gaps would force rolling-gap fallback for missing km
findings.reproduction: trips WITHOUT matching trip_driving_impact in 60d window
findings.recommendation: Audit trip enrichment orchestrator completion rates before brake go-live

findings.title: TDI distance_km diverges from VehicleTrip.distance_km
findings.codeEvidence: TripDrivingImpact stores own distance_km from DI compute
findings.dataEvidence: 135 joined rows with |tdi.distance - trip.distance| > 0.5 km fleet-wide
findings.impact: Modeled km may disagree with odometer/trip ledger; coverage ratio semantics unclear
findings.reproduction: JOIN trip_driving_impact ON vehicle_trips WHERE abs(delta)>0.5
findings.recommendation: Align TDI distance source with trip finalize distance or document delta

findings.title: VEHICLE_003 lacks reference spec — backfill ineligible
findings.impact: Cannot auto-init from registration backfill; manual service required
findings.recommendation: Manual brake service or spec capture for VEHICLE_003

findings.title: Legacy brakePadPercent null fleet-wide
findings.codeEvidence: buildNoBaselineSummary checks legacy brakePadPercent for WARNING_ONLY
findings.impact: No legacy telemetry fallback path; pure NO_BASELINE UX
findings.recommendation: Do not rely on legacy path; prioritize V2 init

findings.title: Rolling VDI hard-brake metrics zero despite 454 harsh driving events
findings.dataEvidence: hard_brake_per_100km=0 for all 6 VDI rows; 454 HARSH_ACCELERATION/CORNERING events 60d
findings.impact: Gap-fill wear would under-estimate harsh braking stress if initialized
findings.recommendation: Verify DI scorer inputs from TripBehaviorEvent vs DrivingEvent paths

findings.title: Rolling 30d aggregate would fill historical gaps post-init
findings.dataEvidence: 6 VDI rows present; would apply current rolling to past uncovered km
findings.impact: Historical wear backfill uses present behavior — optimistic/pessimistic bias
findings.recommendation: After init, monitor modeling_source and provenanceWarnings

findings.title: BrakeTripMetric unused
findings.impact: Architecture misleading; no idempotency layer for trip brake metrics

scopeReplaySummary.note: No BRAKE_SERVICE events in production — scope replay requires post-init fleet

modelPlausibilitySummary.reason: No initialized BrakeHealthCurrent — cannot reproduce wear outputs
